description: A large farm wants to analyze how its equipment was utilized during the planting season to identify inefficiencies.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve telematics data for all planters and tractors for the duration of the planting season.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets data on engine hours, working time, idle time, and travel time.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data to calculate the percentage of time each machine spent working, idling, and traveling.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates the utilization metrics for each machine.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report that highlights machines with high idle times, suggesting opportunities for better logistics planning or operator training.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent's report identifies two tractors with over 40% idle time, indicating a bottleneck in seed tendering.
